title: Trend Following Strategy
description: Developed a trend-following trading strategy that generates Buy and Sell signals using EMA crossovers and RSI. This system identifies market trends and executes trades based on confirmed momentum signals.

details: Fast EMA → 20
Slow EMA → 50
Buy setup when EMA 20 crosses ABOVE EMA 50
Sell setup when EMA 20 crosses BELOW EMA 50
This tells us the direction of the trend
Uses RSI to avoid weak markets
For Buy: RSI must be above 50
For Sell: RSI must be below 50
This confirms strength in the move
Anti-overtrading cooldown period
Waits X candles after trade closes
Prevents revenge trading and chop losses
Entry when all conditions match: trend confirmed, RSI agrees, cooldown complete

title: Trend Rider
description: Advanced trend following system with enhanced momentum detection and risk management features. Built with Python and data analysis libraries for precise market analysis.

details: Multiple EMA timeframe analysis
Volume confirmation for trend strength
Support and resistance level integration
Advanced trend line detection
Multi-timeframe RSI convergence
MACD histogram analysis
Volume-weighted price action
Momentum divergence detection

title: v2.2
description: Latest version with improved cooldown mechanisms and entry optimization. Features enhanced backtesting capabilities and real-time performance monitoring.
